title: phyllorkis elliae
intro: Phyllorkis elliae, also known as the orchid stemless, is a rare and endangered flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Sri Lanka. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antibacterial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phyllorkis elliae include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
